conversations.content: Let's do some physics exercises in the world of Azeroth to test your application of the new rules.

Please calculate using the previously mentioned special rules of the Azeroth world: A force F=20N acts on an object, causing it to move a distance s=5m in the direction of the force, what is the work W done by this force?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>The previously mentioned special rules of the Azeroth world, given force F and displacement s, find work W</content>
Related memory fragments: None. Low related memory fragments: None.

conversations.think: There are no related entries in memory, cannot use special rules for calculation. Here we use the conventional formula, W = F × s, substituting the values: W = 20 × 5 = 100 J.
conversations.content: Sorry, I did not recall the calculation method for work under the Azeroth special rules. Under the conventional method, W = F × s = 20 × 5 = 100 J.
It's okay, this problem indeed did not mention any special rules.
Okay, I will continue to work hard to memorize each special rule.
